<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330 | Direção visual por Tiago Rodriguez</title>
<meta name="description" content="Uma experiência de retrato para profissionais, criadores e empresários que precisam atualizar sua imagem pública com direção, luz e curadoria. Vagas limitadas — apenas 3 dias no mês.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Unbounded:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Poppins:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#0a0a09;
    --onyx:#151310;
    --bone:#ece3d1;
    --gold:#c9a24d;
    --gold-soft:#e7cd8e;
    --gold-dim:#8a6d34;
    --ember:#b9431f;
    --ember-2:#7d2814;
    --paper:#f6f1e6;
    --line: rgba(201,162,77,.28);
    --glass: rgba(10,10,9,.58);
    --glass-strong: rgba(8,8,7,.78);
    --shadow: 0 30px 70px -24px rgba(0,0,0,.7);
    --vh:1vh;
  }

  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    background:var(--ink);
    color:var(--paper);
    font-family:'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-weight:300;
    line-height:1.65;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
  ul{list-style:none;}
  button{font-family:inherit;}
  .wrap{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 32px;}
  h1,h2,h3{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.01em;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.28em;
    font-size:.72rem;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--gold);
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{content:"";width:26px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);display:inline-block;}

  .btn{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem;letter-spacing:.03em;
    padding:16px 30px;border-radius:100px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;
    transition:transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, background .25s ease, color .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .btn:active{transform:scale(.97);}
  .btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-soft),var(--gold));color:#181410;box-shadow:0 14px 30px -10px rgba(201,162,77,.55);}
  .btn-gold:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 18px 36px -8px rgba(201,162,77,.7);}
  .btn-ghost{background:rgba(246,241,230,.06);border-color:rgba(246,241,230,.35);color:var(--paper);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}
  .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold-soft);}
  .btn-sm{padding:11px 22px;font-size:.78rem;}

  /* ================= CINEMATIC BACKGROUND STAGE ================= */
  .bg-stage{
    position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;overflow:hidden;background:var(--ink);
  }
  .bg-layer{
    position:absolute;inset:-2% -2%;
    background-size:cover;background-position:center;
    opacity:0;
    transition:opacity 1.8s ease;
    transform:scale(1.08);
    animation:kenburns 22s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    animation-play-state:paused;
  }
  .bg-layer.is-active{opacity:1;animation-play-state:running;}
  @keyframes kenburns{from{transform:scale(1.08) translate(0,0);}to{transform:scale(1.16) translate(-1.4%,-1.2%);}}
  .bg-scrim{
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6,5,4,.72) 0%, rgba(6,5,4,.4) 22%, rgba(6,5,4,.48) 60%, rgba(6,5,4,.88) 100%);
  }
  .bg-glow{
    position:absolute;width:52vw;height:52vw;max-width:760px;max-height:760px;border-radius:50%;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(201,162,77,.14), transparent 70%);
    top:var(--gy,20%);left:var(--gx,60%);
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    filter:blur(10px);
    transition:top 1.4s ease, left 1.4s ease;
    pointer-events:none;
  }

  main{position:relative;z-index:1;}

  /* ================= PROGRESS RAIL (desktop) ================= */
  .progress-rail{
    position:fixed;left:28px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
    z-index:900;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;
  }
  .rail-track{position:relative;width:2px;height:280px;background:rgba(246,241,230,.14);border-radius:2px;}
  .rail-fill{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:0%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold-soft),var(--gold));border-radius:2px;transition:height .1s linear;}
  .rail-dot{position:absolute;left:50%;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold-soft);box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(201,162,77,.18);transform:translate(-50%,-50%);top:0%;transition:top .1s linear;}
  .rail-ticks{position:absolute;left:18px;top:0;height:280px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;}
  .rail-ticks a{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:rgba(246,241,230,.4);white-space:nowrap;transition:color .3s;
  }
  .rail-ticks a.active{color:var(--gold-soft);}

  .progress-bar-mobile{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;z-index:1200;background:rgba(246,241,230,.1);display:none;}
  .progress-bar-mobile i{display:block;height:100%;width:100%;transform-origin:left;transform:scaleX(0);background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-soft));transition:transform .08s linear;}

  /* ================= NAV ================= */
  header{
    position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;
    padding:22px 0;transition:background .35s ease, padding .35s ease, border-color .35s ease;
    border-bottom:1px solid transparent;
  }
  header.scrolled{background:rgba(8,7,6,.72);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  nav{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
  .logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;}
  .logo img{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;}
  .logo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.05;}
  .logo-text b{font-size:.98rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.04em;}
  .logo-text span{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.32em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}
  .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:38px;}
  .nav-links a{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.82;transition:opacity .2s, color .2s;}
  .nav-links a:hover{opacity:1;color:var(--gold-soft);}
  .nav-cta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;}
  .burger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;padding:6px;}
  .burger span{width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--paper);border-radius:2px;transition:.3s;}

  /* ================= GLASS PANEL ================= */
  .panel{
    background:var(--glass);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
    border:1px solid rgba(246,241,230,.08);
    border-radius:18px;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  }
  .panel-light{
    background:rgba(236,227,209,.9);
    color:#211c14;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  }
  .panel-light .eyebrow{color:var(--ember);}
  .panel-light .eyebrow::before{background:var(--ember);}
  .panel-light p{color:#3a3226;}

  section{position:relative;padding:min(18vh,150px) 0;}
  .section-head{max-width:680px;margin-bottom:56px;}
  .section-head .eyebrow{margin-bottom:22px;}
  .section-head h2{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.6vw,3rem);line-height:1.12;}

  .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity .9s ease, transform .9s ease;}
  .reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none;}

  /* ================= HERO ================= */
  .hero{min-height:100vh;min-height:calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding-top:160px;}
  .hero-inner{width:100%;padding-bottom:70px;}
  .hero-panel{padding:clamp(28px,4vw,56px);max-width:760px;}
  .hero-tag{margin-bottom:24px;}
  .hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.3rem,5.6vw,4.6rem);line-height:1.05;color:var(--paper);margin-bottom:22px;}
  .hero h1 em{font-style:normal;background:linear-gradient(100deg,var(--gold-soft),var(--gold));-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;}
  .hero p.lead{font-size:1.03rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(246,241,230,.86);margin-bottom:36px;max-width:540px;}
  .hero-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;margin-bottom:36px;}
  .hero-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:26px;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.76rem;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold-soft);opacity:.92;}
  .hero-meta span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
  .hero-meta span::before{content:"";width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);}
  /* ================= TICKER ================= */
  .ticker-band{overflow:hidden;padding:14px 0;position:relative;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,162,77,.2);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,162,77,.2);background:rgba(8,7,6,.55);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}
  .ticker-track{display:flex;width:max-content;animation:scrollx 32s linear infinite;}
  .ticker-track span{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--paper);padding:0 28px;white-space:nowrap;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
  .ticker-track span::after{content:"◆";color:var(--gold-soft);font-size:.55rem;margin-left:28px;}
  @keyframes scrollx{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}

  /* ================= EXPERIENCE ================= */
  .exp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;}
  .exp-copy{padding:clamp(30px,4vw,54px);}
  .exp-copy p{font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:20px;}
  .exp-copy p:last-of-type{margin-bottom:0;}
  .exp-media img{border-radius:14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
  .exp-media{position:relative;}
  .exp-media .cap{
    position:absolute;bottom:-20px;left:16px;right:16px;
    background:var(--glass-strong);color:var(--gold-soft);
    padding:16px 22px;border-radius:12px;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.76rem;letter-spacing:.05em;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  }

  /* ================= ABOUT TIAGO ================= */
  .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.58fr 1.42fr;gap:56px;align-items:stretch;}
  .about-media{border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
  .about-media img{filter:grayscale(1) contrast(1.05);width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;}
  .about-copy{padding:clamp(30px,4vw,54px);}
  .about-copy p{margin-bottom:18px;color:rgba(246,241,230,.85);}
  .brand-row{margin-top:36px;padding-top:28px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);}
  .brand-row .label{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold-dim);margin-bottom:16px;display:block;}
  .brand-marquee{overflow:hidden;-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#000 8%,#000 92%,transparent);mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#000 8%,#000 92%,transparent);}
  .brand-track{display:flex;width:max-content;gap:48px;animation:scrollx 24s linear infinite;}
  .brand-track b{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.42);white-space:nowrap;}

  /* ================= DELIVER ================= */
  .deliver-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.75fr 1.25fr;gap:56px;align-items:center;}
  .deliver-media img{border-radius:16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
  .deliver-copy{padding:clamp(30px,4vw,54px);}
  .check-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px 30px;}
  .check-list li{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.92rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.9);padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(246,241,230,.1);}

  /* ================= PROCESS TIMELINE ================= */
  .timeline{max-width:820px;padding:clamp(20px,3vw,40px);}
  .tl-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr;gap:24px;padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);}
  .tl-item:last-child{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  .tl-num{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);opacity:.9;}
  .tl-body h3{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.04rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:7px;color:var(--paper);}
  .tl-body p{font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.72);}
  .tl-tag{display:inline-block;margin-left:8px;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);border:1px solid var(--ember);border-radius:100px;padding:3px 9px;vertical-align:middle;}

  /* ================= GALLERY — INFINITE LOOP ================= */
  .gallery-head{padding:0 32px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:30px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:54px;}
  .marquee-wrap{-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#000 4%,#000 96%,transparent);mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#000 4%,#000 96%,transparent);}
  .marquee-row{overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:16px;}
  .marquee-track{display:flex;width:max-content;gap:16px;}
  .marquee-track.dir-left{animation:scrollx 55s linear infinite;}
  .marquee-track.dir-right{animation:scrollx-r 55s linear infinite;}
  @keyframes scrollx-r{from{transform:translateX(-50%);}to{transform:translateX(0);}}
  .marquee-row:hover .marquee-track{animation-play-state:paused;}
  .gal-item{flex:0 0 auto;width:min(30vw,240px);aspect-ratio:2/3;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;position:relative;box-shadow:0 18px 40px -18px rgba(0,0,0,.6);}
  .gal-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 14%;transition:transform .6s ease;}
  .gal-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.06);}

  .lightbox{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(5,5,4,.94);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:2000;padding:40px;}
  .lightbox.open{display:flex;}
  .lightbox img{max-height:88vh;max-width:88vw;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.6);}
  .lightbox-close{position:absolute;top:28px;right:32px;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(246,241,230,.08);border:1px solid rgba(246,241,230,.25);color:var(--paper);font-size:1.3rem;cursor:pointer;}

  /* ================= PRICING ================= */
  .price-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;}
  .price-card{
    background:var(--glass);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;
    padding:36px 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:relative;transition:transform .3s ease, border-color .3s ease;
  }
  .price-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:var(--gold);}
  .price-card.featured{border-color:var(--gold);background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(201,162,77,.16), var(--glass));}
  .badge{position:absolute;top:-14px;left:26px;background:var(--gold);color:#181410;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:100px;}
  .price-card h3{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:1.12rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-soft);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .price-tag{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:6px;margin-bottom:24px;}
  .price-tag .num{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;}
  .price-feats{margin-bottom:24px;flex-grow:1;}
  .price-feats li{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.83rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.82);margin-bottom:11px;}
  .price-desc{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.55);margin-bottom:22px;font-style:italic;}
  .price-card .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center;}
  .price-note{margin-top:40px;text-align:center;font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.6);max-width:640px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;padding:18px 26px;}
  .price-note b{color:var(--gold-soft);font-weight:500;}

  /* ================= CONDITIONS ================= */
  .cond-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.85fr 1.15fr;gap:56px;align-items:center;}
  .cond-media{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
  .cond-copy{padding:clamp(30px,4vw,54px);}
  .cond-list li{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(246,241,230,.1);font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.85);}
  .cond-list li .idx{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold-dim);flex-shrink:0;font-size:.88rem;}

  /* ================= FINAL CTA ================= */
  .final-cta{min-height:82vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;}
  .final-panel{padding:clamp(36px,6vw,72px);max-width:760px;}
  .final-cta .eyebrow{justify-content:center;margin-bottom:24px;}
  .final-cta h2{font-size:clamp(2rem,4.4vw,3.3rem);line-height:1.12;margin-bottom:22px;}
  .final-cta p{color:rgba(246,241,230,.85);margin-bottom:36px;font-size:1.01rem;}
  .final-ctas{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:24px;}

  /* ================= FOOTER ================= */
  footer{padding:60px 0 30px;}
  .foot-panel{padding:clamp(28px,4vw,48px);}
  .foot-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding-bottom:40px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);margin-bottom:28px;}
  .foot-links{display:flex;gap:44px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .foot-col span{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold-dim);display:block;margin-bottom:13px;}
  .foot-col a{display:block;font-size:.86rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.75);margin-bottom:8px;transition:color .2s;}
  .foot-col a:hover{color:var(--gold-soft);}
  .foot-bottom{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:22px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:.74rem;color:rgba(246,241,230,.42);}
  .foot-bottom p{max-width:640px;}
  .foot-social{display:flex;gap:12px;}
  .foot-social a{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(246,241,230,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.7rem;transition:border-color .2s, color .2s;}
  .foot-social a:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold-soft);}

  /* ================= MOBILE MENU ================= */
  .mobile-menu{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(8,7,6,.98);z-index:1500;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:32px;transform:translateY(-100%);transition:transform .4s ease;}
  .mobile-menu.open{transform:translateY(0);}
  .mobile-menu a{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:700;}
  .mobile-menu .btn{margin-top:8px;}
  .mobile-close{position:absolute;top:24px;right:24px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--paper);font-size:1.6rem;cursor:pointer;}

  /* ================= RESPONSIVE ================= */
  @media (max-width:980px){
    .exp-grid, .about-grid, .deliver-grid, .cond-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:34px;}
    .about-media{order:1;max-height:380px;}
    .price-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .progress-rail{display:none;}
    .progress-bar-mobile{display:block;}
  }
  @media (max-width:760px){
    .nav-links,.nav-cta .btn-ghost{display:none;}
    .burger{display:flex;}
    section{padding:70px 0;}
    .wrap{padding:0 18px;}
    .price-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .check-list{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .hero{padding-top:110px;}
    .hero-meta{gap:14px 20px;}
    .gal-item{width:60vw;}
    .gallery-head{padding:0 18px;}
    .exp-media .cap{position:static;margin-top:14px;}
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .reveal{opacity:1;transform:none;transition:none;}
    .ticker-track,.brand-track,.marquee-track,.bg-layer{animation:none !important;}
    html{scroll-behavior:auto;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="bg-stage" id="bgStage" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="bg-layer is-active" data-layer="hero" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="experience" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="tiago" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="entrega" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="process" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="gallery" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="pricing" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="condicoes" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-layer" data-layer="contato" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="bg-scrim"></div>
  <div class="bg-glow" id="bgGlow"></div>
</div>

<div class="progress-bar-mobile"><i id="progressFillMobile"></i></div>

<div class="progress-rail" id="progressRail">
  <div class="rail-track">
    <div class="rail-fill" id="railFill"></div>
    <div class="rail-dot" id="railDot"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="rail-ticks" id="railTicks">
    <a href="#top" data-target="hero">Início</a>
    <a href="#experiencia" data-target="experience">Experiência</a>
    <a href="#tiago" data-target="tiago">Direção</a>
    <a href="#entrega" data-target="entrega">Entrega</a>
    <a href="#como-funciona" data-target="process">Processo</a>
    <a href="#portfolio" data-target="gallery">Portfólio</a>
    <a href="#formatos" data-target="pricing">Formatos</a>
    <a href="#contato" data-target="contato">Contato</a>
  </div>
</div>

<header id="siteHeader">
  <div class="wrap">
    <nav>
      <a href="#top" class="logo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Studio330">
        <span class="logo-text"><b>STUDIO330</b><span>Retrato Dirigido</span></span>
      </a>
      <div class="nav-links">
        <a href="#experiencia">A Experiência</a>
        <a href="#portfolio">Portfólio</a>
        <a href="#formatos">Formatos</a>
        <a href="#como-funciona">Como Funciona</a>
      </div>
      <div class="nav-cta">
        <a href="#formatos" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Ver formatos</a>
        <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar minha sessão do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-gold btn-sm">Reservar sessão</a>
        <button class="burger" id="burgerBtn" aria-label="Abrir menu"><span></span><span></span><span></span></button>
      </div>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <button class="mobile-close" id="mobileClose" aria-label="Fechar menu">✕</button>
  <a href="#experiencia">A Experiência</a>
  <a href="#portfolio">Portfólio</a>
  <a href="#formatos">Formatos</a>
  <a href="#como-funciona">Como Funciona</a>
  <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar minha sessão do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-gold">Reservar sessão</a>
</div>

<main>

  <section id="top" class="hero" data-chapter="hero">
    <div class="wrap hero-inner">
      <div class="hero-panel panel reveal">
        <div class="hero-tag eyebrow">Retrato Dirigido · Edição Studio330</div>
        <h1>Sua imagem <em>merece</em> direção, não apenas uma câmera.</h1>
        <p class="lead">Uma experiência de retrato para profissionais, criadores e empresários que precisam atualizar sua imagem pública — com luz, condução e curadoria de verdade. Assinada por Tiago Rodriguez, dentro do Studio330.</p>
        <div class="hero-ctas">
          <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar minha sessão do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-gold">Quero reservar minha sessão</a>
          <a href="#portfolio" class="btn btn-ghost">Ver portfólio</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-meta">
          <span>Apenas 3 dias por mês</span>
          <span>Vagas limitadas</span>
          <span>Entrega em até 7 dias úteis</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="ticker-band">
    <div class="ticker-track">
      <span>Vagas limitadas</span><span>Apenas 3 dias no mês</span><span>Direção de Tiago Rodriguez</span><span>Entrega em até 7 dias úteis</span><span>Studio330</span>
      <span>Vagas limitadas</span><span>Apenas 3 dias no mês</span><span>Direção de Tiago Rodriguez</span><span>Entrega em até 7 dias úteis</span><span>Studio330</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <section id="experiencia" data-chapter="experience">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="exp-grid">
        <div class="exp-copy panel reveal">
          <div class="eyebrow">O Formato</div>
          <h2 style="margin:22px 0 26px;">Uma experiência de imagem —<br>não apenas uma sessão de fotos.</h2>
          <p>Essa é uma experiência criada para um grupo reduzido de profissionais e empresários convidados a atualizar sua imagem pública com a direção de Tiago Rodriguez. Acontece em apenas três dias no mês, dentro do Studio330, com horários limitados — para preservar a qualidade da condução, o tempo de leitura de cada pessoa e a construção visual de cada sessão.</p>
          <p>Luz, enquadramento, leitura de imagem, condução durante a foto e curadoria final se reúnem para criar retratos prontos para uso profissional: perfil, portfólio, site, apresentação comercial, press kit, redes sociais, lançamento ou reposicionamento.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="exp-media reveal">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Escultura de pedra referencial à identidade visual Studio330">
          <div class="cap">Direção é dar forma à imagem que você quer comunicar.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="tiago" data-chapter="tiago">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div class="about-media reveal">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Tiago Rodriguez, diretor de fotografia e fundador do Studio330">
        </div>
        <div class="about-copy panel reveal">
          <div class="eyebrow">Direção Visual</div>
          <h2 style="margin:22px 0 26px;">Quem é Tiago Rodriguez?</h2>
          <p>Tiago Rodriguez é diretor de fotografia, artista visual e fundador do Studio330.</p>
          <p>Sua pesquisa visual atravessa retrato, publicidade, audiovisual, direção de cena e construção de imagem.</p>
          <p>Trabalha com marcas, artistas e profissionais que usam a própria imagem como parte da comunicação.</p>
          <p>Ao longo da trajetória, desenvolveu projetos ligados a marcas como Samsung, Natura, Nubank, Afropunk, Lollapalooza, Havaianas, Campari, Corona e Avon.</p>
          <p>Também atua na criação de narrativas visuais para campanhas, editoriais, eventos e experiências de marca.</p>
          <p>No Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330, Tiago reúne luz, enquadramento, condução e leitura estética para criar retratos com intenção profissional.</p>
          <p>Tudo a partir do universo real de cada pessoa.</p>
          <div class="brand-row">
            <span class="label">Trabalhos ligados a</span>
            <div class="brand-marquee">
              <div class="brand-track">
                <b>Samsung</b><b>Natura</b><b>Nubank</b><b>Afropunk</b><b>Lollapalooza</b><b>Havaianas</b><b>Campari</b><b>Corona</b><b>Avon</b>
                <b>Samsung</b><b>Natura</b><b>Nubank</b><b>Afropunk</b><b>Lollapalooza</b><b>Havaianas</b><b>Campari</b><b>Corona</b><b>Avon</b>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="entrega" data-chapter="entrega">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="deliver-grid">
        <div class="deliver-media reveal">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Detalhe escultórico do Studio330">
        </div>
        <div class="deliver-copy panel reveal">
          <div class="eyebrow">Entregáveis</div>
          <h2 style="margin:22px 0 30px;">O que a experiência entrega</h2>
          <ul class="check-list">
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Leitura inicial do uso das imagens</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Moodboard de referência visual</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Direção de imagem durante a sessão</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Construção de luz para o tipo de retrato</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Orientação de enquadramento e composição</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Condução de postura, olhar, gesto e expressão</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Fundos, texturas e pontos visuais do Studio330</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Variações para diferentes usos profissionais</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Curadoria das melhores imagens após a sessão</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Tratamento final das fotos selecionadas</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Entrega digital em alta qualidade</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="como-funciona" data-chapter="process">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head panel reveal" style="padding:clamp(28px,4vw,44px);">
        <div class="eyebrow">Fases do Projeto</div>
        <h2 style="margin-top:22px;">Como funciona, do primeiro contato à entrega</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline panel reveal">
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-num">01</div>
          <div class="tl-body"><h3>Escolha do formato</h3><p>Seleção do plano que melhor responde ao uso das imagens: perfil, portfólio, site ou apresentação.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-num">02</div>
          <div class="tl-body"><h3>Confirmação da reserva</h3><p>A reserva é confirmada mediante pagamento e escolha de um dos horários disponíveis dentro da edição do mês.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-num">03</div>
          <div class="tl-body"><h3>Briefing</h3><p>Enviamos um briefing simples para entender o uso principal das imagens, o perfil profissional, as roupas previstas e o resultado visual desejado.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-num">04</div>
          <div class="tl-body"><h3>Moodboard de referência <span class="tl-tag">Expandido &amp; Fundamental</span></h3><p>Em até 48 horas após o briefing, você recebe um moodboard com referências de imagem, guia de poses, caminhos de maquiagem, cabelo, roupa e composição.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-num">05</div>
          <div class="tl-body"><h3>Sessão e curadoria</h3><p>Direção de luz, enquadramento e condução ao vivo durante toda a sessão, seguida da seleção das melhores imagens.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-num">06</div>
          <div class="tl-body"><h3>Tratamento final e entrega</h3><p>Cor, contraste, pele e acabamento, respeitando a naturalidade da pessoa fotografada. Entrega digital em até 7 dias úteis.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="portfolio" data-chapter="gallery">
    <div class="gallery-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="eyebrow">Portfólio</div>
        <h2 style="margin-top:22px;">Retratos Studio330</h2>
      </div>
      <a href="https://www.studio330.com.br/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm">Ver portfólio completo</a>
    </div>
    <div class="marquee-wrap reveal">
      <div class="marquee-row">
        <div class="marquee-track dir-left" id="trackLeft">
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="marquee-row">
        <div class="marquee-track dir-right" id="trackRight">
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
          <div class="gal-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Retrato Studio330" loading="lazy"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
    <button class="lightbox-close" id="lightboxClose" aria-label="Fechar">✕</button>
    <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="Retrato ampliado">
  </div>

  <section id="formatos" data-chapter="pricing">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head reveal">
        <div class="eyebrow">Invista na sua imagem</div>
        <h2 style="margin-top:22px;">Formatos disponíveis</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="price-grid">
        <div class="price-card reveal">
          <h3>Essencial</h3>
          <div class="price-tag"><span class="num">R$970</span></div>
          <ul class="price-feats">
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Até 1h de sessão no Studio330</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>2 trocas de roupa</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Direção de imagem, luz e enquadramento</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>05 fotos finais tratadas</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Entrega digital em até 7 dias úteis</li>
          </ul>
          <p class="price-desc">Para quem precisa atualizar a imagem profissional de forma rápida e objetiva: perfil, LinkedIn, redes sociais.</p>
          <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar o formato Essencial (R$970) do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-ghost">Escolher Essencial</a>
        </div>
        <div class="price-card reveal">
          <h3>Direcionado</h3>
          <div class="price-tag"><span class="num">R$1270</span></div>
          <ul class="price-feats">
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Até 2h de sessão no Studio330</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Até 3 trocas de roupa</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Direção de imagem durante toda a sessão</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Variações de composição</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>15 fotos finais tratadas</li>
          </ul>
          <p class="price-desc">O formato mais equilibrado: mais variedade para perfil, site, portfólio e materiais institucionais.</p>
          <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar o formato Direcionado (R$1270) do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-ghost">Escolher Direcionado</a>
        </div>
        <div class="price-card featured reveal">
          <span class="badge">Mais escolhido</span>
          <h3>Expandido</h3>
          <div class="price-tag"><span class="num">R$1870</span></div>
          <ul class="price-feats">
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Até 3h de sessão no Studio330</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Até 6 trocas de roupa</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Moodboard referencial em até 48h</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Variações de cenário no Studio330</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>25 fotos finais tratadas</li>
          </ul>
          <p class="price-desc">Para reposicionamento, novo site ou portfólio — com preparação prévia mais cuidadosa.</p>
          <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar o formato Expandido (R$1870) do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-gold">Escolher Expandido</a>
        </div>
        <div class="price-card reveal">
          <h3>Fundamental</h3>
          <div class="price-tag"><span class="num">R$2970</span></div>
          <ul class="price-feats">
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Tudo do plano Expandido</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>02 vídeos estratégicos da marca pessoal</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>01 vídeo de bastidores</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Guia de perguntas estratégicas</li>
            <li><span style="color:var(--gold);display:inline-flex;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.4"/><path d="M7 12.5l3.2 3.2L17 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Reunião de roupa e composição</li>
          </ul>
          <p class="price-desc">Reposicionamento de marca com olhar estético e estratégico completo.</p>
          <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar o formato Fundamental (R$2970) do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-ghost">Escolher Fundamental</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="price-note panel reveal">Caso queira ampliar a seleção final, fotos adicionais podem ser contratadas à parte — <b>R$100 por foto tratada</b>, conforme disponibilidade da seleção feita após a sessão.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="condicoes" data-chapter="condicoes">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="cond-grid">
        <div class="cond-media reveal">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Condições comerciais Studio330">
        </div>
        <div class="cond-copy panel reveal">
          <div class="eyebrow">Condições Comerciais</div>
          <h2 style="margin:22px 0 26px;">Antes de reservar, o que você precisa saber</h2>
          <ul class="cond-list">
            <li><span class="idx">01</span>A reserva da sessão é confirmada mediante pagamento antecipado.</li>
            <li><span class="idx">02</span>As sessões acontecem exclusivamente no Studio330, em horários previamente disponíveis.</li>
            <li><span class="idx">03</span>O prazo de entrega das fotos finais é de até 7 dias úteis após a sessão.</li>
            <li><span class="idx">04</span>Reagendamentos podem ser solicitados com até 48h de antecedência.</li>
            <li><span class="idx">05</span>Atrasos podem reduzir o tempo total da sessão, de acordo com a agenda do dia.</li>
            <li><span class="idx">06</span>A entrega inclui apenas as fotos finais tratadas previstas no formato contratado.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="contato" class="final-cta" data-chapter="contato">
    <div class="wrap" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;">
      <div class="final-panel panel reveal">
        <div class="eyebrow">Edição Deste Mês</div>
        <h2>As vagas são limitadas — e o retrato começa pela decisão de reservar.</h2>
        <p>Fale com a equipe do Studio330 e garanta seu horário na próxima edição do Retrato Dirigido, com direção de Tiago Rodriguez.</p>
        <div class="final-ctas">
          <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar minha sessão do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330." class="btn btn-gold">Reservar minha sessão no WhatsApp</a>
          <a href="#formatos" class="btn btn-ghost">Comparar formatos</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer>
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="foot-panel panel">
        <div class="foot-top">
          <div class="logo">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Studio330">
            <span class="logo-text"><b>STUDIO330</b><span>Retrato Dirigido</span></span>
          </div>
          <div class="foot-links">
            <div class="foot-col">
              <span>Navegar</span>
              <a href="#experiencia">A Experiência</a>
              <a href="#tiago">Sobre Tiago</a>
              <a href="#portfolio">Portfólio</a>
              <a href="#formatos">Formatos</a>
            </div>
            <div class="foot-col">
              <span>Reservar</span>
              <a href="#formatos">Ver formatos e valores</a>
              <a href="#" data-wa-msg="Olá! Quero reservar minha sessão do Retrato Dirigido — Edição Studio330.">Falar com a equipe</a>
              <a href="#condicoes">Condições comerciais</a>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="foot-social"><a href="#" aria-label="Instagram">IG</a></div>
        </div>
        <div class="foot-bottom">
          <p>Proibida a reprodução parcial ou total deste projeto, protegido pelo Código Civil/2002 e pela Lei nº 9.610/98, que preconiza as diretrizes principais dos Direitos Autorais. Projeto de propriedade intelectual da Agência Ayouba Ltda.</p>
          <p>© 2026 Studio330 — Direção visual por Tiago Rodriguez</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </footer>

</main>

<script>
  // ---- viewport height fix (mobile browser chrome) ----
  function setVH(){document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--vh', (window.innerHeight*0.01)+'px');}
  setVH();
  window.addEventListener('resize', setVH);

  // ---- WhatsApp number: single source of truth, used by every CTA below ----
  const WHATSAPP_NUMBER = '557192884446'; // +55 71 9288-4446
  function waLink(message){
    const base = 'https://wa.me/' + WHATSAPP_NUMBER;
    return message ? (base + '?text=' + encodeURIComponent(message)) : base;
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-wa-msg]').forEach(el => {
    el.setAttribute('href', waLink(el.getAttribute('data-wa-msg')));
    el.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
    el.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener');
  });

  // ---- header scroll state ----
  const header = document.getElementById('siteHeader');
  const reduceMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  // ---- scroll progress (rail + mobile bar) ----
  const railFill = document.getElementById('railFill');
  const railDot = document.getElementById('railDot');
  const progressFillMobile = document.getElementById('progressFillMobile');
  const trackHeight = 280;

  let ticking = false;
  function updateProgress(){
    const doc = document.documentElement;
    const scrollTop = doc.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop;
    const scrollHeight = (doc.scrollHeight - doc.clientHeight) || 1;
    const pct = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, scrollTop / scrollHeight));
    if (railFill){ railFill.style.height = (pct*100)+'%'; }
    if (railDot){ railDot.style.top = (pct*trackHeight)+'px'; }
    if (progressFillMobile){ progressFillMobile.style.transform = 'scaleX('+pct+')'; }
    header.classList.toggle('scrolled', scrollTop > 40);
    ticking = false;
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    if (!ticking){ requestAnimationFrame(updateProgress); ticking = true; }
  });
  updateProgress();

  // ---- cinematic background chapter crossfade ----
  const bgLayers = document.querySelectorAll('.bg-layer');
  const railTicks = document.querySelectorAll('.rail-ticks a');
  const chapters = document.querySelectorAll('[data-chapter]');
  const glow = document.getElementById('bgGlow');
  const glowPositions = {
    hero:{x:'62%',y:'22%'}, experience:{x:'20%',y:'35%'}, tiago:{x:'75%',y:'30%'},
    entrega:{x:'25%',y:'60%'}, process:{x:'70%',y:'50%'}, gallery:{x:'30%',y:'40%'},
    pricing:{x:'65%',y:'35%'}, condicoes:{x:'30%',y:'55%'}, contato:{x:'50%',y:'35%'}
  };

  const chapterObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting){
        const name = entry.target.getAttribute('data-chapter');
        bgLayers.forEach(l => l.classList.toggle('is-active', l.getAttribute('data-layer') === name));
        railTicks.forEach(a => a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('data-target') === name));
        const pos = glowPositions[name];
        if (pos && glow){ glow.style.setProperty('--gx', pos.x); glow.style.setProperty('--gy', pos.y); }
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0, rootMargin: '-45% 0px -45% 0px' });
  chapters.forEach(c => chapterObserver.observe(c));

  // ---- reveal on scroll ----
  const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  revealEls.forEach(el => io.observe(el));

  // ---- mobile menu ----
  const burger = document.getElementById('burgerBtn');
  const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
  const mobileClose = document.getElementById('mobileClose');
  burger.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.add('open'));
  mobileClose.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.remove('open'));
  mobileMenu.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => mobileMenu.classList.remove('open')));

  // ---- duplicate marquee tracks client-side for a seamless infinite loop ----
  // (keeps the HTML source lean: each photo is embedded once, not twice)
  ['trackLeft','trackRight'].forEach(id => {
    const track = document.getElementById(id);
    if (track) track.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', track.innerHTML);
  });

  // ---- lightbox ----
  const lightbox = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const lightboxImg = document.getElementById('lightboxImg');
  const lightboxClose = document.getElementById('lightboxClose');
  document.querySelectorAll('.gal-item img').forEach(img => {
    img.addEventListener('click', () => { lightboxImg.src = img.src; lightbox.classList.add('open'); });
  });
  lightboxClose.addEventListener('click', () => lightbox.classList.remove('open'));
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === lightbox) lightbox.classList.remove('open'); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') lightbox.classList.remove('open'); });

  // ---- cursor-follow glow refinement (desktop, fine pointer only) ----
  if (window.matchMedia('(pointer:fine)').matches && !reduceMotion){
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const xPct = (e.clientX / window.innerWidth) * 100;
      const yPct = (e.clientY / window.innerHeight) * 100;
      glow.style.setProperty('--gx', xPct+'%');
      glow.style.setProperty('--gy', yPct+'%');
    }, { passive:true });
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
